---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new workflow
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is hard or missing today?

## Proposed Behavior

What should Copicu do?

## Use Case

Who benefits from this, and when?

## Notes

Copicu is CopyQ-inspired, not CopyQ-compatible. If this is based on a CopyQ feature, describe the user value rather than only asking for parity.

Use synthetic examples only. Do not include real clipboard content.
